meta.title: Online MBA in Project Management with 100% Job Assistance
meta.description: Master project planning, execution, risk control, and leadership with the MBA in Project Management, designed for future project leaders and strategic managers.

@graph.name: MBA in Project Management
@graph.description: Explore the MBA in Project Management program covering planning, execution, risk management, Agile & Scrum, leadership, budgeting, and hands-on project simulations designed for managerial and leadership roles.

mainEntity.name: What is an MBA in Project Management?

acceptedAnswer.text: An MBA in Project Management is a postgraduate program that teaches project planning, execution, risk management, budgeting, and leadership skills. It prepares students to handle complex projects and take on managerial roles across IT, construction, consulting, and other industries.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of the MBA in Project Management program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The MBA in Project Management is a 2-year program, divided into 4 semesters, covering core management subjects, project management methodologies, case studies, and hands-on projects for practical learning.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are covered in the MBA in Project Management syllabus?

acceptedAnswer.text: The syllabus includes Project Planning & Scheduling, Risk Management, Budgeting & Cost Control, Agile & Scrum, Leadership & Team Management, Strategic Management, Quality Management, and Business Analytics. Students also gain hands-on experience through capstone projects and live industry simulations.

mainEntity.name: Do I need prior management or project experience to join?

acceptedAnswer.text: No prior experience is needed. The MBA in Project Management begins with foundational management and project concepts, making it suitable for students from any academic background.

mainEntity.name: Is this MBA suitable for working professionals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The MBA in Project Management offers flexible formats like weekend classes, online modules, and executive programs, enabling working professionals to upskill without pausing their careers.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities are available after an MBA in Project Management?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Project Manager, Program Manager, Operations Manager, Risk Manager, Agile Coach, Project Consultant, Portfolio Manager, or PMO Lead across IT, construction, consulting, manufacturing, and corporate sectors.

mainEntity.name: What are the salary expectations after completing this MBA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fresh graduates can expect ₹6–10 LPA, while experienced professionals in project or program management can earn ₹15–30+ LPA, depending on role, industry, and expertise.

mainEntity.name: What is the eligibility criteria for an MBA in Project Management?

acceptedAnswer.text: Candidates should have a bachelor’s degree from a recognized university in any discipline. Prior work experience or knowledge of business management is optional but can be advantageous.

mainEntity.name: How does placement support work in this MBA program?

acceptedAnswer.text: At Teksversity, students receive complete placement support, including mock interviews, resume building, mentorship, live projects, industry tie-ups, and campus recruitment drives, helping them secure roles in top companies.

mainEntity.name: Why choose Teksversity for an MBA in Project Management?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides an industry-aligned curriculum, live projects, expert mentorship, practical simulations, and placement support, equipping students with the leadership, planning, and execution skills required to excel as project management professionals in global organizations.

heading: Overview of
MBA in Project Management

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Future in Project Leadership and Execution Management

content.value: at Teksversity equips learners with advanced knowledge in managing project lifecycles, resource allocation, risk mitigation, and quality management frameworks. This master’s program empowers professionals to deliver high-impact projects, optimize processes, and drive organizational success. Through hands-on project work, case studies, and tool-based training, students gain practical expertise in planning, executing, and monitoring projects effectively. The MBA in Project Management for working professionals offers flexible online learning for individuals seeking career advancement without interrupting their professional commitments.

keyPoints: Learn core concepts of planning, execution, control, and evaluation
Master tools for scheduling, budgeting, documentation, and monitoring
Build strong analytical, leadership, and problem-solving skills
Apply risk management, governance, and quality assurance methods
Prepare for leadership and managerial roles in diverse project environments

whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity for your online MBA project management program means joining a curriculum that blends managerial strategy with industry-standard project methodologies. The program focuses on leadership, risk assessment, process optimization, and real-world project execution essential skills for today’s project-driven business world

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
